source: eccodes 2.34.1 grib_get_data + grib_get. Oracle for DRS template 5.41 (grid_png), re-encoded from eta_lambert_msg0.grib2 at its native 13-bit depth (full-fidelity round-trip; eccodes' libpng writer rejects the small regular_latlon_surface field, and forcing a low bit depth there clips the range). Provenance in NOTICE.md.
